# Summary

<!-- Describe what this pull request changes and why. -->

## Related issue

<!-- Link the issue this addresses, e.g. "Closes #123". Write "None" if not applicable. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor:`)
- [ ] Performance (`perf:`)
- [ ] Tests (`test:`)
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR title follows the conventional commit format (for example `feat: ...`, `fix: ...`).
- [ ] `make check` passes locally (lint, format, typecheck, lockfile, tests).
- [ ] Tests have been added or updated to cover the change.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated where relevant.
- [ ] New functions and public methods carry a `@beartype` decorator and use specific exception types from `gaze.exceptions`.
